title: lepidium nanum
intro: Lepidium nanum, also known as cress or pepper grass, is a plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lepidium nanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Lepidium nanum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
